DB_BRIDGE_URL.label: Database bridge URL
DB_BRIDGE_URL.helpText: Server-only HTTPS endpoint used when hosted runtimes cannot open Postgres sockets.

DB_BRIDGE_TOKEN.label: Database bridge token
DB_BRIDGE_TOKEN.helpText: Shared secret used only between Devvit and the database bridge.

DATABASE_URL.label: Supabase DATABASE_URL
DATABASE_URL.helpText: Server-only pooled Supabase Postgres connection string.

DB_HOST.label: Supabase DB host
DB_HOST.helpText: Use only if DATABASE_URL is not set.

DB_PORT.label: Supabase DB port
DB_PORT.helpText: Use 6543 for the Supabase transaction pooler.

DB_USER.label: Supabase DB user
DB_USER.helpText: Use only if DATABASE_URL is not set.

DB_PASSWORD.label: Supabase DB password
DB_PASSWORD.helpText: Use only if DATABASE_URL is not set.

DB_SSL.label: Database SSL mode
DB_SSL.helpText: Leave empty for Supabase; set disable only for trusted local Postgres.

items.label: New Hellish Golf hole
items.description: Create a new Hellish Golf daily-style post
